instruction: Create a file /app/fib.py that defines a function fibonacci(n) returning the nth Fibonacci number (0-indexed, so fibonacci(0)=0, fibonacci(1)=1, fibonacci(10)=55). The script should print the result of fibonacci(10) when run directly.
test_command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/app'); from fib import fibonacci; assert fibonacci(0)==0; assert fibonacci(1)==1; assert fibonacci(10)==55; assert fibonacci(20)==6765; print('ALL TESTS PASSED')"
